Executes `arm-none-eabi-addr2line` to map addresses to line numbers in `tintin_boot.elf`.

# Purpose
This script is a shell executable that uses the `arm-none-eabi-addr2line` tool to convert addresses into file names and line numbers. It is intended for use with the `tintin_boot.elf` executable file located in the `build` directory. The script takes a single argument, which is the address to be translated. This functionality is useful for debugging purposes, allowing developers to trace back to the source code location corresponding to a specific address in the compiled binary.
